subject: (RALRE: Notice of proposed sale of 17-19 First Avenue | Mansi & Sheene [HR-BRI.FID852291] (RAL627)
snippet: Dear Colleagues I note you have asked for a response by both COB today, and COB this Friday. We are obtaining our client's instructions, and will revert by COB Friday. Christine Kennedy ​​​​
